zh.Napton, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.Napton On The Hill, Warwickshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: Isolda de Salceto是Robert de Salceto的女兒，於1202年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾。她於大約1237年與Adam de Broughton III在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isolda de Salceto是Robert de Salceto的女儿，于1202年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾。她于大约1237年与Adam de Broughton III在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Salceto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Francisco, Rafael, Ana, Jesus, Carlos, Manuel, Miguel, Pedro, Jorge.

Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Salcedo, named with a collective form of salce ‘willow tree’, or a topographic name denoting someone living by willow trees. Compare Saucedo .

variants.name: Salcido
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Jesus, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Luis, Roberto, Raul, Francisco, Juana, Adelina.
Hispanic (Mexico): probably an altered form of Spanish   Salcedo  .

variants.name: Saucedo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Raul, Miguel, Roberto, Alfredo, Guadalupe.
Spanish: variant of   Salcedo  . Compare   Sausedo  .

nameMeanings.name: Isolda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

en.lifeSummary: Isolda de Salceto was born in 1202, in Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert de Salceto. She married Adam de Broughton III about 1237, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolda de Salcetoは1202年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアナプトン オン ス ヒルでRobert de Salcetoの娘として生まれた。約1237年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでAdam de Broughton IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.Napton On The Hill, Warwickshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 나프턴  테 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Isolda de Salceto(은)는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 나프턴  테 힐에서 Robert de Salceto의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Adam de Broughton III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.Napton On The Hill, Warwickshire, Englan: наптон он т хилл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Isolda de Salceto родилась в 1202 г. в местности наптон он т хилл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert de Salceto. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Broughton III около 1237 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.
